lore.english:
Taimanin, brother of Yatsu Murasaki. Born into the Yatsu Clan, a lower-ranking ninja family under the Igawa Clan, he was unable to awaken his Taimanin powers for a long time. Resigned to the fact that he couldn't use ninja arts, he enlisted in the Japan Ground Self-Defence Force Ranger Unit, but lost sight in both eyes and was discharged. By a twist of fate, this blindness triggered the awakening of his ninja art, and he now actively serves as a Taimanin. Aside from his frequent complaints and cynical personality, he is a reliable ally who stands apart from other Taimanins who were raised in Gosha.

He uses the supernatural ninja art "Awakened Immortal". Known as a one-man army for his immense strength, he possesses near-immortal regenerative abilities. However, he cannot regenerate the two eyes he lost before awakening his powers. Instead, he has acquired a sixth sense beyond natural—according to him, he perceives his surroundings with a clarity surpassing sight itself, even discerning colors in vivid detail.

skills.description: Increase DEF of All allies by 20% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase DEF of All allies by 20% in All Battles

skills.description: Runs toward the enemy and attacks 2 times with a knife.
skills.description_readable: Runs toward the enemy and attacks 2 times with a knife.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]CQC-Commando Attack[-]
skills.description:
Runs toward the enemy and consecutively slashes 5 times.
If the target isn't a boss, fills [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:40202]%)[-] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:40202]%[-] and [&Provocation]s the target on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:40203] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Runs toward the enemy and consecutively slashes 5 times.
If the target isn't a boss, fills Turn Gauge by (20%) at a fixed chance of -100% and Taunts the target on Last Attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Awakened Immortal[-]
skills.description:
When the character's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]30%[-], gains [&Athanasia] when hit.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:40301] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
When the character's HP is less than 30%, gains Immortal when hit.
Duration: 1 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_401]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_401]
skill_data.description:
Runs toward the enemy with a dagger and attacks 2 times.
Reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_403] by [V2:41102] turn(s) [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].
skill_data.description_readable:
Runs toward the enemy with a dagger and attacks 2 times.
Reduces Cooldown of Awakened Immortal by -1 turn(s) after the attack.
